posts.author: Robwett
posts.body: Predictions: 16 of 16 Pending | Tied for 1st with 131 others This card is awesome

posts.author: AyyLmaonnaise
posts.body: Predictions: 16 of 16 Pending | Tied for 1st with 131 others Hiramatsu vs. KashimuraJinnosuke Kashimura, SUB, R1Kashimura’s striking is garbage but he’s a really solid grappler. Easy sub 1Sugiyama vs. ChinaSora Sugiyama, TKO, R3This is a sick prospect fight. China is only 19 yet has 3 years of pro experience under his belt, and sugiyama had a kickboxing career prior to MMA. He’s only 3-0 but has beaten some experienced guys. China seems like a good grappler so that could cause issues, but this is also a big step up in comp for himIzumi vs. YamamotoTakeshi Izumi, DECIzumi can’t finish anything but he is a very annoying guy to fight. He is a lay n pray merchant but he’s fought and beaten good comp at the international level. Would be a solid win for soshiNakamura vs. KarinoYu Karino, TKO, R2Unc is craftyKubota vs. OzakiRen Ozaki, DECI haven’t seen the fight but it sucks to see Ozaki lose again; he appears to be the classic Japanese striker who looks elite on the feet but can’t grapple. He lost on dwcs due to wrestling and I assume his recent loss came the same way. Hes still young though but I worry his wrestling/ground game will never be good enough to make the ufc. Rizin would be a good landing spot though

posts.author: Robwett
posts.body: Predictions: 16 of 16 Pending | Tied for 1st with 131 others Ushiku vs. MizunoJuntaro Ushiku, DECFor some reason I have a feeling we will be seeing a good performance from UshikuOhara vs. KuramotoDaigo Kuramoto, TKO, R2I picked Ohara last time they fought but after seeing how Ohara was looking before the no contest I have to pick Kuramoto this time. He did not look like he could take punches.Hiramatsu vs. KashimuraJinnosuke Kashimura, SUB, R1Kashimura has horrible striking but his BJJ is so good that he should have no problem submitting this guyMuramoto vs. MatsuzawaRikiya Matsuzawa, TKO, R1Matsuzawa has been on a roll lately, even his recent loss was a fluke after he was beating on Honda for the entire fight.Sugiyama vs. ChinaSukai China, SUB, R2This is an amazing fight between 2 young prospects. Striker vs grappler. Sugiyama will have a clear advantage on the feet but I really like China and he has very nice BJJ so I'm picking him to catch Sugiyama with somethingTakizawa vs. MiyabiShunsuke Miyabi, TKO, R1Good to see Miyabi back after he got hit by a carIzumi vs. YamamotoTakeshi Izumi, DECIzumi is better than his record, I think he will out-craft the less experienced guy hereAkazawa vs. KindaichiYukinori Akazawa, TKO, R1Kindaichi should not be at heavyweight, he's very clearly a lightweight that has got fatTakahashi vs. MitsuiShunki Mitsui, TKO, R1Takahashi did good for like 1 minute against Aimoto before getting knocked out and I think the same thing is gonna happen hereNakamura vs. KarinoYu Karino, TKO, R2Would love too see old man Nakamura win again but I don't see that happening against some that can match his old man grapplingKubota vs. OzakiRen Ozaki, DECOzaki's recent loss was kinda funny, his opponent and he dropped each other at the exact same time but Taiyo recovered faster and jumped on his back and choked him out. I'm a bit worried about this fight since Kubota has the style that Ozaki struggles with, forward pressure with tons of clinching and grappling. I'll still pick him since I have faith in his abilitiesAkimoto vs. KonnoYushi Akimoto, DECUnfortunately this fight is cancelled, I was looking forward to seeing Kyoma's brother fight again * Edited at 05.01.2026, 5:16 AM ET *
